pageContext.name: Clone Trooper Phase II 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The Fight Remains!  The eleventh release in The Faces of the Empire™ collection features the Phase 2 Clone Troopers™. Manufactured by Kaminoan™ armor smiths, the Phase 2 armor was the cutting-edge equipment worn by the Clone Troopers™ during the final days of the Clone Wars™.   Made from 1oz of pure silver, the piece is superbly crafted to replicate the shape and color of the Phase 2 Clone Trooper's helmet. To further enhance the design, some relief has been added. The Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is engraved on the obverse, confirming it as legal tender.   Officially licensed, each coin comes safely stored inside a Star Wars™ themed case, which includes a large window for display. To further confirm the coin's legal tender status, a Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case, along with the coin's unique number in the limited mintage of 10,000. Flip open the box to find the specifications.  These troopers are sure to shoot away fast, so target yours quickly!
